property.name: noOfWeeksBefore
property.label: Number of Weeks Before
property.description: How many weeks before today to include events from.

property.name: noOfWeeksAfter
property.label: Number of Weeks After
property.description: How many weeks after today to include events until.

property.name: showSearchBar
property.label: Show Search Bar
property.description: Show or hide the search bar for events.

property.name: showNextUpcomingOnly
property.label: Show Only Next Upcoming Event
property.description: If checked, only the next upcoming event will be shown.
